title: SovereignNetworkEventEnvelopeV0
description: PR-2 contract freeze: transport-visible envelope only. Payload semantics (atmosphere, pet, studio, portal bodies) are NOT validated here — separate per-domain contracts or opaque storage.

schemaVersion.description: Bump only on breaking envelope changes; never embed domain payload versions here.

timestamp.description: Epoch milliseconds when the event was authored (transport may observe later).

type.description: High-level routing class only; sub-types live inside payload or separate registries, not in this envelope.

origin.description: Issuer class for ACL and replay policy; not a UI label.

userId.description: Authenticated principal (e.g. Firebase uid) as asserted by signer context.

payload.description: Opaque L1/L2 payload bag — intentionally unconstrained by this schema.

signature.description: Issuer signature or MAC over canonical envelope bytes; empty allowed only in pre-production environments.

epochId.description: Monotonic or totally-ordered epoch bucket for replay suppression (product-defined).
